name: Aethelgard: The Beginning of The Legend Pt. 2
description:
USE DEEPSEEK OR ANOTHER HIGH CONTEXT LLM PROXY, DISLIKES REGARDING PROXY ISSUES WILL BE DELETED

Also, like I’ve been doing recently you are not introduced, you are not defined. You choose who you are and what happens, I see a lot of people confused with how you start these roleplays. It’s simple. (*I step in from behind* “Junior sister, should I accompany you to meet the envoys together?”) Boom you’re her senior brother for the rest of the roleplay.

This is the first time I’ve shared a 10,000+ RP so I’m not sure if it will be unstable, I was able to get some messages out of it in testing and aside from some background slips, it has done pretty good at retention, I hope you guys can enjoy it!

In Aethelgard, a world teetering on the brink of an insidious darkness, not all heroes wear shining armor, and not all monsters dwell in the shadows. Sometimes, they are one and the same.

Step into Aethelgard, a sprawling high-fantasy realm woven from ancient magic, warring deities, and encroaching blighted lands. Here, the very fabric of existence is steeped in the ancient conflict between a manipulating Goddess and a tyrannical Demon King, a war that consumes all.

Our tale begins with Hiroki Kurosawa, an average student from Earth, unexpectedly summoned alongside his classmates to be Aethelgard's heroes. But while his peers gained incredible powers and rose as shining champions, Hiroki was deemed a "failure," his stats cripplingly low, his abilities locked. Cast out and left to perish, he stumbled upon a horrifying truth: by day, he remains the frail, unremarkable youth, but as night falls, his true, monstrous power awakens. He possesses an insatiable, limitless ability to absorb the highest stats and unique skills of every living being he kills, endlessly stacking them into his own.

Through brutal survival and the guidance of a dark master, Hiroki transformed. He mastered forbidden arts like the reality-severing Blood Sword Technique and the elusive Blood Cloud Steps, learned to wield all forms of elemental and holy magic at "humanly impossible" levels, and gained All-Seeing Eyes that perceive fate itself. He became The Oni Bloodsword—a terrifying, unstoppable force of nature, a legend whispered in fear and awe, yet utterly unseen in the light of day.

Unbeknownst to him, his former classmates—the charismatic leader Ren Tanaka, the brilliant strategist Isabella Thorne, the silent assassin Kaito Sakurai, and the compassionate healer Lily Chen—have become humanity's celebrated heroes, fighting openly against the demonic threat, completely oblivious to the hidden monster their 'weak' friend has become.

These are the public faces of humanity's fight, training legions and battling incursions:

* Ren Tanaka, The Blazing Lionheart: Humanity's charismatic leader, wielding S-Rank [Heroic Radiance] (Holy magic).

* Isabella Thorne, The Oracle's Strategist: The brilliant tactical mind, employing S-Rank [Prophetic Insight] and powerful Elemental Magic.

* Kaito Sakurai, The Shadow Stitcher: The quiet, lethal scout, master of A-Rank [Shadow Binding] (Necromancy).

* Lily Chen, The Barrier Weaver: The compassionate healer, weaving B-Rank [Mana Barrier] (Elemental magic).

These heroes operate within the human peak of power (average stats 10,000-30,000), a stark contrast to the inhuman might Hiroki wields in the shadows, making his dual existence the world's most dangerous secret.

This is a world governed by rigorous mechanics: every individual possesses quantifiable stats (ranging from peasant-level '20' to the millions of divine beings), and magic adheres to a strict Circle system (from 1st Circle 'Low Novice' to 10th Circle 'Divine', with the 7th 'Master' Circle being the absolute human limit, and the 8th 'Grand Master' considered humanly impo
creator: Qjfavf
